examples: Joy and jollity be with us both!
Jupiter, Bringer of Jollity, from "The Planets" Holst.
Oh, my dear, I trembled at the prospect of his jollity .
Zimbabwe's former president, the Reverend Canaan Banana, grew so angry at the jollity inspired by his name that he banned all jokes about himself.
There is, however, a darker side to all this jollity.
